name: open-brain
description: Semantic knowledge server -- pgvector search, decision/thought logging, session persistence via MCP
notes: Runtime dependency via mcp2cli -- unlike GSD/OMC/PAUL, Open Brain is a live service, not just pattern extraction. Skills call mcp2cli open-brain <tool> at runtime. Server runs on LXC 208 (10.71.20.15:3100).
